display.purpose: Screen-level headings, hero titles on onboarding and empty states.

body.purpose: Primary reading text, form labels, descriptions. Max 75ch.

label.purpose: Button text, tab labels, chip labels.

shadows.name: ambient-soft
shadows.purpose: Optional light card lift on tinted surfaces.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Filled indigo primary action button. Used for 'Buat Proyek', 'Daftar', 'Simpan'.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #4E61F6; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; padding: 16px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; min-height: 54px; transition: background 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.35,0,0.25,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7181F8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #3745AF; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #D2D5DB; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outlined Button
components.description: White outlined button for secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-outlined { background: #fff; color: #131927; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; padding: 16px 20px; border: 1px solid #E5E7EA; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; min-height: 48px; transition: border-color 0.18s cubic-bezier(0.35,0,0.25,1), background 0.18s; } .ds-btn-outlined:hover { border-color: #D2D5DB; background: #F9FAFB; } .ds-btn-outlined:active { border-color: #9EA2AE; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default card container for project cards, profile cards, content items.
components.html:
Nama Proyek

Deskripsi singkat proyek dan kebutuhan tim.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #E5E7EA; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.25; color: #131927; margin: 0 0 6px 0; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.45; color: #6D717F; margin: 0; } .ds-card-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Filled text input with soft background and subtle border.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input { background: #F9FAFB; border: 1px solid #E5E7EA; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.45; color: #131927; font-family: inherit; outline: none; transition: background 0.18s, border-color 0.18s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9EA2AE; } .ds-input:focus { background: #EDEFFE; border-color: #4E61F6; border-width: 1.2px; } .ds-input:disabled { background: #E5E7EA; color: #9EA2AE; }

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.description: Four-tab bottom navigation bar with center create button.
components.html:
Beranda
Jelajah
Proyek
Profil
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #fff; padding: 7px 16px; box-shadow: 0 -4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; cursor: pointer; flex: 1; padding: 8px 0; } .ds-nav-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #9EA2AE; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-nav-active .ds-nav-label { color: #4E61F6; } .ds-nav-create { width: 44px; height: 44px; background: #4E61F6; border-radius: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #4E61F6; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Chip / Tag
components.description: Compact skill or category tag with subtle fill.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #EDEFFE; color: #3745AF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 8px; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-secondary { background: #F3F4F6; color: #6D717F; } .ds-chip-active { background: #4E61F6; color: #fff; }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: Section title row with optional action link.
components.html:
Proyek Terbaru

Temukan proyek menarik untuk kamu
components.css: .ds-section-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; gap: 12px; } .ds-section-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #131927; margin: 0; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-section-subtitle { font-size: 12px; color: #6D717F; margin: 3px 0 0 0; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-section-action { background: none; border: none; color: #4E61F6; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; font-family: inherit; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px 12px; white-space: nowrap; transition: opacity 0.15s; } .ds-section-action:hover { opacity: 0.8; }

narrative.overview:
Rembugan is a student collaboration platform that feels like a creative studio on campus — energetic but focused, collaborative without being chaotic. The design serves the primary job: finding teammates and building projects together.

The system is flat by default with tonal layering. Surfaces distinguish themselves through subtle borders and background shifts rather than shadows. Color is used with restraint: the indigo primary appears on interactive elements and key accents, never as decoration. The cool grey neutral palette keeps the interface quiet enough that content — projects, people, conversations — carries the visual energy.

This system explicitly rejects: the sterile corporate aesthetic of LinkedIn-clone dashboards, the childish gamification of badge-heavy student platforms, and the generic SaaS template of gradient heroes and identical card grids.
keyCharacteristics: Flat surfaces with 1px borders; no shadows at rest
Cool-grey neutral palette with a single indigo accent used sparingly
Single sans-serif typeface (Inter) across all hierarchies
Rounded but not pill-shaped corners (12–16px for surfaces)
Dark mode with inverted grey scale preserving the same hierarchy

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Studio Indigo is used on ≤15% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point — color carries meaning, not decoration.

rules.name: The Single Voice Rule
rules.body: One typeface, weight is the only hierarchy axis. Never mix a second font for 'personality' — the personality is in the content, not the font stack.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, focus) or as the single structural exception (bottom nav).

dos: Do use Studio Indigo on interactive elements only — buttons, links, active nav, selected states.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; reserve shadows for state changes.
Do use the cool grey scale for all non-interactive surfaces and text.
Do use weight as the primary hierarchy axis (700 → 600 → 400).
Do test all text on the actual surface color: body text (#6D717F on #FFFFFF = 4.6:1, just above AA).
Do use the same 12px radius for all interactive elements (buttons, inputs) and 16px for containers (cards, sheets).
donts: Don't use Studio Indigo as a decorative background wash or section color. The accent earns its place through interaction.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or side-stripe borders anywhere.
Don't pair a second typeface with Inter — one family carries the full hierarchy.
Don't use repeated identical card grids with icon + heading + text as a layout default.
Don't use uppercase tracked eyebrow labels ('ABOUT', 'PROCESS') above every section.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
Don't over-round corners: cards cap at 16px, buttons at 12px. Pill shapes (999px) only for tags and avatars.
Don't add shadows to cards and buttons that already have a 1px border — choose one strategy per element.
Don't make the app feel corporate or LinkedIn-clone sterile. Student-native means approachable, not professional-dark.
Don't gamify with excessive badges, ribbons, or achievement patterns. The platform's value is in connecting people, not collecting points.
